# Differential-oracle vectors: REAL chrony nts_ntp_server.c (+ nts_ntp_auth.c,
# ntp_ext.c, siv_nettle.c/siv_nettle_int.c over the FIPS-197 shim AES), commit
# 120dfb8. The NTS-KE cookie codec is a deterministic reversible stub (serialises
# the NKE_Context: algorithm + c2s + s2c keys, 4-aligned). A client request is built
# (unique-id + cookie + placeholder + auth EF under the C2S key); the server checks
# it and generates the response (unique-id + 2 fresh cookies + auth EF under S2C).
# Context: alg=AES_SIV_CMAC_256, c2s=01..20, s2c=80..9f. nonce/cookies deterministic
# (LCG seed 0x1234567890abcdef). CHECK/RESP/PKT(hex response)/TAMPER/NOCOOKIE.
# Consumer is Rust (nts_ntp_server.rs); NO Python.
CHECK ret=1 kod=0x0
RESP ret=1 len=276
PKT 
TAMPER ret=0 kod=0x4e54534e
NOCOOKIE ret=0 kod=0x0
